required_skills: Frontend Development with React or Vue.js
Backend API Development with Node.js or Python
responsibilities: Architect and deliver end-to-end product features spanning React frontend, Node.js or Python backend APIs, and PostgreSQL data models
Design and implement RESTful and GraphQL APIs that are secure, versioned, and optimized for both web and mobile consumers
Build responsive, accessible frontend interfaces in React that integrate seamlessly with backend services and third-party platforms
Own the full deployment lifecycle of features from local development through staging and production on AWS or GCP infrastructure
Design relational database schemas, write optimized queries, and implement migration strategies for evolving data models
Implement authentication flows including OAuth 2.0, JWT-based session management, and role-based access control across the full stack
Instrument applications with logging, error tracking, and performance monitoring to maintain high production reliability
Collaborate directly with product managers, designers, and data teams to scope, estimate, and ship user-facing features in two-week sprints
Conduct full-stack code reviews and set quality standards for both client-side and server-side code across the engineering team
Optimize application performance across the stack by profiling bottlenecks in UI rendering, API latency, and database query plans
